comment: MF velocity layer only. Filenames split between 'MF ' (uppercase,
lower octaves) and 'Mf ' (mixed case, upper octaves) — filePatterns
tries MF first then falls back to Mf. Space encoded as %20 in the
pattern so the URL is RFC-valid and the per-sample `file` field
round-trips at runtime. Generated by analyzer/generate-samples.js
